question: Apa perbedaan antara Deployment dan StatefulSet? Kapan sebaiknya menggunakan masing-masing?
selection_rationale: SO answer score 89. Both Deployment and StatefulSet exist in graph. Cross-resource conceptual comparison is a new pattern (all existing conceptual fixtures cover single resources in isolation). D2=2 because expected_path spans two separate root nodes. G4 penalty applied (StatefulSet covered individually) but comparison angle is new.

ground_truth.answer: Deployment cocok untuk aplikasi stateless yang semua Pod-nya identik dan dapat dibuat ulang kapan saja. StatefulSet digunakan untuk aplikasi stateful yang membutuhkan identitas Pod yang stabil, urutan deployment/termination, dan penyimpanan persisten per-Pod. Contoh: gunakan Deployment untuk web server, gunakan StatefulSet untuk database seperti MySQL atau Cassandra.
context: io.k8s.api.apps.v1.Deployment: enables declarative updates for stateless Pods and ReplicaSets; Pods are interchangeable
io.k8s.api.apps.v1.StatefulSet: manages stateful applications with stable network IDs and persistent storage per Pod
io.k8s.api.apps.v1.StatefulSetSpec: volumeClaimTemplates provides stable per-Pod PersistentVolumeClaims
